_description: Each artifact can be found only once per campaign. Duplicate rolls take the next item down (wrap around). Three types: Equipment (given to character, lost if character dies), Colony Item (colony-wide benefit), Single-Use (activate when desired, then gone). Melee artifact weapons give +2 brawling bonus and can replace a Pistol.

entries.name: Flex-rigid armor vest
entries.description: The character receives a 4+ Armor Saving Throw.

entries.name: Preventative nano deployment
entries.description: Increase the Colony Repair Rate by +1.

entries.name: Ancient AI chip
entries.description: Gain one additional Research Point per campaign turn.

entries.name: Inherent core principal carbine
entries.description: Range 15 inches, Damage 2, Shots 1, +1 to hit.

entries.name: Mutative nano materials
entries.description: Gain one additional Build Point per campaign turn.

entries.name: Short-range phase displacer
entries.description: When moving, the character may teleport to any location within their movement range instead of moving normally.

entries.name: Adjusted bio-targeting array
entries.description: Increase Colony Defenses by +1.

entries.name: Altered psi-wave emitter
entries.description: All characters in Sick Bay immediately recover completely.

entries.name: Alien translation guide
entries.description: The next two research topics have their Research Point cost halved, rounded up.

entries.name: Bio-present induction schematic
entries.description: Gain 3 Augmentation Points.

entries.name: Nervous system override cathode
entries.description: The character increases their base Move and Dash distances by +1 inch each.

entries.name: Phase anticipation sword
entries.description: Weapon: Damage 2, Melee. The character does not suffer a penalty when rolling a 1 during a brawl.

entries.name: Programmed restoration settlement module
entries.description: When activated, restore up to 10 points of Colony Integrity.

entries.name: Regenerative building material schematic
entries.description: Mitigate 1 point of building damage per campaign turn.

entries.name: Psi-boosted nano-blade
entries.description: Weapon: Damage 2, Melee. Ignores Saving Throws.

entries.name: Ancient language translation aid
entries.description: Gain 3 Story Points and 1 Mission Data.

entries.name: Visual Distortion Module
entries.description: All ranged attacks targeting the character take a -1 hit penalty.

entries.name: Flexible bolt launcher
entries.description: Weapon: Range 8 inches, Shots 2, Damage 1 OR Range 24 inches, Shots 1, Damage 2. Pick which version is used each time the character shoots.

entries.name: Neo-ancient data cache
entries.description: When activated, this counts as completing a campaign Milestone.

entries.name: Predictive sighting module
entries.description: The character may reroll all 1s on to-hit dice when firing.

entries.name: Bio-frame optimization serum
entries.description: When activated, permanently increase one character's Toughness by +1.

entries.name: Transcendence blueprints
entries.description: When activated, increase Colony Morale by +4 and gain +1 Augmentation Points.

entries.name: Time dilution serum
entries.description: When activated, permanently increase one character's Speed by +1 inch.

entries.name: Shard projection rifle
entries.description: Weapon: Range 24 inches, Shots 2, Damage 2, Focus (both shots must target the same figure).

entries.name: Crystalline assault harness
entries.description: The character receives a 5+ Armor Saving Throw. When brawling, they may roll twice and pick the best score.

entries.name: Focused beam emitter
entries.description: Weapon: Range 18 inches, Shots 1, Damage 4.

entries.name: Organic pattern booster
entries.description: A character that just died can be restored to life.

entries.name: Sub-psionic visor
entries.description: Character may extend all visibility penalties by 4 inches.

entries.name: Mind induction device
entries.description: A character immediately gains 5 XP. Gain 1 Mission Data.
